channel.title: Rss-Reader on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Rss-Reader on Arrans github.io

item.title: RSSNext/Follow
item.description: 🧡 Follow your favorites in one inbox

item.title: martinrotter/rssguard
item.description: Feed reader (podcast player and also Gemini protocol client) which supports RSS/ATOM/JSON and many web-based feed services.

item.title: lwindolf/liferea
item.description: Liferea (Linux Feed Reader), a news reader for GTK/GNOME

item.title: fossar/selfoss
item.description: multipurpose rss reader, live stream, mashup, aggregation web application
